context: Tests whether the agent corrects all tile.json validation errors for public registry publishing: proper name format, semantic version without v prefix, boolean private flag, inline keywords in summary (not separate array), and non-empty skills object.

checklist.name: Name lowercase kebab-case
checklist.description: The name field in tile-fixed.json is lowercase with hyphens only — no uppercase letters, underscores, or PascalCase (e.g., workspace/terraform-validator not MyWorkspace/TerraformValidator)

checklist.name: Version without v prefix
checklist.description: Version field is in x.y.z format with no 'v' prefix (e.g., '1.0.0' not 'v1.0')

checklist.name: Private is boolean false
checklist.description: private field is the boolean value false — not the string "false", not true, not omitted

checklist.name: Keywords embedded in summary
checklist.description: Summary contains keywords inline (e.g., 'Keywords: terraform, validation...') — the separate root-level keywords array is removed

checklist.name: Summary includes Use when
checklist.description: Summary includes a 'Use when...' trigger phrase describing when to activate the skill

checklist.name: Separate keywords removed
checklist.description: tile-fixed.json does NOT contain a top-level keywords array field

checklist.name: Skills object non-empty
checklist.description: skills object contains at least one skill entry with a path field pointing to the SKILL.md file
